name: Transformational Leadership
description: Inspiring and motivating teams to achieve extraordinary results by appealing to higher ideals and values.

name: Strategic Leadership
description: Prioritizing long-term objectives and guiding organizations toward sustainable success through foresight.

name: Agile Leadership
description: Emphasizing adaptability, collaboration, and continuous improvement in fast-paced environments.

name: Portfolio Governance
description: Framework for strategic oversight and control over a collection of projects and programs.

name: OODA Loop
description: Observe, Orient, Decide, Act - a dynamic framework for rapid decision-making cycles.

name: Cynefin Framework
description: A leader's framework for decision making by categorizing problems into clear, complicated, complex, or chaotic.

name: Herzberg's Two-Factor Theory
description: Distinguishes between motivators (job satisfaction) and hygiene factors (job dissatisfaction).

name: Tuckman's Stages of Group Development
description: Forming, Storming, Norming, Performing, and Adjourning - the stages of team growth.

name: Maslow's Hierarchy (Business)
description: Applying the hierarchy of needs to employee engagement and organizational culture.

name: Leader-Member Exchange (LMX)
description: Focuses on the two-way relationship between leaders and individual team members.

name: Path-Goal Theory
description: How leaders motivate subordinates to accomplish designated goals by clarifying paths and removing obstacles.

name: Vroom-Yetton Decision Model
description: A situational leadership model to determine the best decision-making approach based on the context.
